output.title: TikTok & Reel Hook Pack: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Use these problem-aware TikTok hooks and short-form scripts to demand your money back fast. Only $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: Hook #1: The Shock Factor — Landlord Not Returning Deposit
Hook #2: The Legal Countdown — Security Deposit Not Returned in 30 Days
Hook #3: The Deduct Debunk — What Can a Landlord Deduct From Your Deposit
Hook #4: The Rights Reminder — Tenant Rights Security Deposit
Hook #5: The Direct Demand — My Landlord Won't Give Me My Deposit Back
Visual & Caption Pairing Guide for High Retention
Conversion CTA: From Scroll to Demand Letter
key_points: Landlords in most states must return deposits within 14-45 days and provide an itemized deduction list.
Normal wear and tear, vague cleaning fees, and unstated damages are common illegal withholdings.
Sending a formal security deposit demand letter is the fastest way to recover funds before small claims court.
Deposits-Back.com generates a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds for a flat $19.99 with no sign-up or subscription.
The highest-converting social hooks lead with tenant frustration and pivot immediately to legal empowerment and action.
output.cta: Your landlord has your money. You have the law on your side. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no sign-up, no subscription, no waiting. Visit Deposits-Back.com and get your deposit back now.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters who are problem-aware that their landlord is withholding, not returning, or wrongfully deducting their security deposit, and who are actively searching for fast, affordable legal tools to recover their money.
